description_long: This is a rectangular desk with a light gray tabletop and wooden legs, featuring a large flat-screen monitor, a Dell desktop computer tower, a full-sized keyboard, and a mouse on a brown mousepad. The desk has a clean, modern design with a sturdy wooden frame and a spacious surface area suitable for computer work. The monitor is centrally placed, with the computer tower positioned to the left side of the desk. The keyboard and mouse are neatly arranged in front of the monitor, indicating a setup optimized for productivity. The desk appears to have a cable running from the computer tower to the monitor, suggesting functional connectivity. There are no visible drawers or additional storage compartments integrated into the desk itself. The overall appearance is professional and organized, suitable for an office or workstation environment.
description: A modern rectangular desk with a gray top and wooden legs, set up as a computer workstation with a monitor, desktop tower, keyboard, and mouse. The surface is clean and organized, ideal for office or study use.
description_view_0: The desk is viewed from the right side, showing the keyboard, mouse, and monitor in profile, with the computer tower partially visible behind the monitor.
description_view_1: The desk is seen from the back, highlighting the rear of the monitor, the computer tower's ports, and the overall width of the desk surface.
description_view_2: The desk is viewed from the left side, with the computer tower fully visible and the monitor and keyboard seen edge-on.
description_view_3: The desk is shown from the front, displaying the monitor, keyboard, mouse, and computer tower clearly, with the user-facing side of the desk most prominent.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with the keyboard, mouse, and monitor directly accessible, with the computer tower to the left; this is the functional front of the desk.
